headline: Smart Digital Group Limited Notified of Anticipated Delisting from The Nasdaq Stock Market
summary: NEW YORK, June 17, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The Nasdaq Stock Market (Nasdaq: NDAQ) announced today that it has notified Smart Digital Group Limited (Nasdaq: SDM) that its securities will be delisted from the Nasdaq Stock Market LLC on June 24, unless the company appeals to a Listing Qualifications Hearings Panel. The securities will remain halted, and unavailable to trade, until any appeal is resolved. Following removal from Nasdaq the securities may be eligible for trading in the over-the-count

headline: Small Caps Near Record Highs, Robinhood Rallies 12%: Stock Market Today
summary: U.S. stocks traded higher by midday Wednesday, with semiconductor equipment names and small caps leading the tape, as investors held their fire ahead of Kevin Warsh‘s first interest-rate decision as Federal Reserve chair, due at 2 p.m. ET.

headline: Nasdaq (NDAQ) Stock After 7.6% Year-To-Date Decline Is Valuation Now Stretched?
summary: If you are wondering whether Nasdaq stock still offers good value, the starting point is understanding what the recent share price is really pricing in. Nasdaq recently closed at US$89.29, with the stock up 2.0% over the last week, down 1.9% over the last month, down 7.6% year to date, and up 5.2% over the last year. The three and five year returns sit at 80.3% and 60.5% respectively. These moves sit against a backdrop of ongoing attention on the exchanges and market infrastructure space...

headline: Nasdaq (NDAQ) Rebalances The Nasdaq 100 With 5 New AI And Space Entrants
summary: Nasdaq, Inc. (NasdaqGS:NDAQ) announced its June 2026 quarterly rebalance of the Nasdaq-100 Index. Five companies are set to join the index, while five others will be removed. The additions are concentrated in AI infrastructure and commercial space businesses. The changes reflect updated sector representation within one of the most followed large cap growth indices. The Nasdaq-100 rebalance puts fresh attention on how Nasdaq, Inc. (NasdaqGS:NDAQ) curates exposure to major non financial...
